allow: PowerShell($tcp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; $tcp.Connect\("127.0.0.1", 3738\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $stream = $tcp.GetStream\(\); $stream.ReadTimeout = 2000; $buf = New-Object byte[] 256; try { $n = $stream.Read\($buf, 0, 256\); [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($buf, 0, $n\) } catch { "NO BANNER" }; $tcp.Close\(\))
